---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Saxagliptin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Saxagliptin</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Saxagliptin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Add-on combination therapy Onglyza is indicated in adult patients aged 18 years and older with type-2 diabetes mellitus to improve glycaemic control: as monotherapy:  in patients inadequately...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>opsismodysplasia（98.1%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（97.7%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（97.7%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（97.6%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（97.5%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（96.3%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（96.2%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（96.1%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（96.0%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（95.8%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（85.2%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（82.2%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（64.3%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（61.1%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（58.4%）</li>
<li>obsolete breast fibroadenosis（58.1%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（57.7%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（57.7%）</li>
<li>obsolete functional visual loss（57.7%）</li>
<li>familial chronic myelocytic leukemia-like syndrome（57.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
